summary: Comprehensive testing of Action Center feature (iteration_72) - all tests passed. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests passed covering GET /api/inventory-ledger/action-center endpoint (total, action_summary, actions array, action_types classification, priority_score calculation, sorting by priority desc/available asc, filter by action_type, empty customer returns zeros, missing customer_id returns 422) and item-detail action_summary integration. Frontend: Action Center tab visible (inv-tab-action-center with Zap icon), 5 summary cards render with counts (Shortages:5, Coverage Risk:2, Demand Gaps:3, Reorder:5, No Incoming:8), action table renders 9 rows with badges, priority scores with color coding (115 in red), clickable cards toggle filter, item click opens drawer with action_summary section, Create Supply and History buttons present.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)
Pre-existing Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement opportunity

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/action-center?customer_id=X returns total, action_summary, and actions array
Backend: action_summary contains shortage_count, coverage_risk_count, demand_gap_count, reorder_count, no_incoming_count, total_action_items
Backend: SHORT items have 'shortage' in action_types
Backend: Items with coverage < 0 have 'coverage_risk' in action_types
Backend: Items with demand_gap > 0 have 'demand_gap' in action_types
Backend: Items with 'reorder' action_type have recommended_qty > 0
Backend: Items with (is_short or is_low) and incoming=0 have 'no_incoming' in action_types
Backend: Merged rows can have multiple action_types (e.g., all 5 types with score=115)
Backend: Priority score = sum of weights for action_types (shortage:50, coverage_risk:30, demand_gap:20, reorder:10, no_incoming:5)
Backend: Results sorted by priority_score desc, then available asc for ties
Backend: action_summary counts match counts of action_types in returned rows
Backend: Filter by action_type=shortage returns only items with shortage
Backend: Empty/nonexistent customer returns zeros for all counts and empty actions array
Backend: Missing customer_id returns 422
Backend: item-detail has action_summary for items with actions (SPAM-LITE: score=115, 5 action_types)
Backend: item-detail action_summary is null for OK items without actions (SPAM-12OZ)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 715-867: /action-center endpoint correctly consolidates exceptions, reorder, demand, and supply coverage using _compute_action_item helper
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 731-785: _compute_action_item helper correctly classifies action_types and computes priority_score as sum of weights
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 964-972: item-detail correctly adds action_summary field reusing _compute_action_item
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 812-958: ActionCenterPanel component follows ExceptionsPanel pattern with summary cards, table, filter toggle, item click, and action buttons
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 816-822: ACTION_BADGES map correctly matches backend action types
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 1224-1237: ItemDetailDrawer action_summary section conditionally rendered when detail.action_summary exists
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (customer_id: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Action items: TEST-ITEM-WARN (score=115, all 5 action_types), SPAM-LITE (score=115, all 5 action_types), IMPORT-ITEM-C (score=65, shortage+reorder+no_incoming), IMPORT-ITEM-B (score=65), TEST-IMPORT-A402AED7 (score=65), TEST-WARNONLY-732C83 (score=20, demand_gap only), TEST-REORDER-REG-* (score=5, no_incoming only), TEST_REGRESS_* (score=5).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Action Center feature fully tested. Backend endpoint: GET /api/inventory-ledger/action-center (customer_id required, item optional filter, action_type optional filter). Returns: {total: int, action_summary: {shortage_count, coverage_risk_count, demand_gap_count, reorder_count, no_incoming_count, total_action_items}, actions: [{item, item_description, warehouse, ownership_type, on_hand, incoming, committed, available, status, action_types[], priority_score, unit_of_measure, recommended_qty?, demand_gap?, coverage?, coverage_status?}]}. Priority weights: shortage=50, coverage_risk=30, demand_gap=20, reorder=10, no_incoming=5. Sorted by priority_score desc, available asc. Item-detail endpoint returns action_summary: {action_types[], priority_score} when item has actions, else null. Frontend: Action Center tab (inv-tab-action-center), ActionCenterPanel (inv-action-center-panel), summary cards (inv-action-card-{type}), table (inv-action-center-table), rows (inv-action-row-{i}), item links (inv-action-item-{i}), priority scores (inv-action-priority-{i}), supply buttons (inv-action-supply-{i}), history buttons (inv-action-history-{i}). ItemDetailDrawer action section (inv-detail-action-summary).

actions.action_types: string[] (subset of: shortage, reorder, demand_gap, coverage_risk, no_incoming)

business_logic: Consolidates exceptions, reorder, demand, and supply coverage
Each item can have multiple action_types (merged classification)
priority_score = sum of weights for all action_types
Sorted by priority_score descending, then available ascending for ties
action_summary counts match returned rows' action_types

item_detail_action_summary_field.action_summary_field: Present when item has any actions, null otherwise

action_row.highlighting: bg-red-500/5 for shortage rows, bg-orange-500/5 for coverage_risk rows
action_row.supply_button: Shown when action_types includes shortage, coverage_risk, or reorder
